title: thalictrum flavum subsp. spurium
intro: Thalictrum flavum subsp. spurium, also known as Yellow Meadow Rue, is a flowering plant species within the meadow rue family (Ranunculaceae). The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits associated with Thalictrum flavum subsp. spurium include its ability to aid in respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary tract infections. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
